title: Classic Portuguese Pasta
description: A simple yet flavorful pasta dish inspired by traditional Portuguese cuisine. Fresh rigatoni is tossed in a savory sauce made with chewy Portuguese sausage, herbs, and spices.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook rigatoni pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add Portuguese sausage and cook until browned, breaking up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cooked rigatoni pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with sausage and garlic.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
